bullets: President Donald Trump delivered his first State of the Union address of his second term on February 25, 2026, focusing on economic gains and affordability.
The U.S. Senate concluded the confirmation hearing for Dr. Casey Means, nominated by Trump as surgeon general.
Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskiy met with Norwegian Prime Minister Jonas Gahr Stoere in Kyiv to discuss ongoing support amid the Russia-Ukraine conflict.
Heavy rains triggered landslides in Brazil's Minas Gerais state, leaving 43 people missing and prompting rescue operations.
The U.S. deployed F-22 Raptor jets to Israel, escalating military presence in the Middle East amid regional tensions.
cybercab: Multiple newly built Tesla Cybercabs without steering wheels were spotted at GigaTexas, indicating advancements in fully autonomous vehicle production.
market_mood: Global stock markets exhibited positive sentiment, with the S&P 500 rising 0.9%, Nasdaq up 1.3%, and Dow increasing 0.6% amid cooled AI concerns and improved U.S. consumer confidence.
hot_spot: The escalating tensions in the Middle East, particularly around Gaza and Israel, represent the most urgent geopolitical situation, highlighted by the U.S. deployment of F-22 jets to Israel.
